programme.title: Capítulo 204
programme.desc: Gandia calls out the RBD members for expulsion. Mía tells Franco Miguel's dad died because of him and Miguel came here for revenge. Diego's plans to help the band are revealed. Franco tells Mía that Carlo was responsible for Miguel's dad financial ruin and subsequent death. Simon tells Roberta he has a son. Franco grants Gastón permission to protect Mía from Miguel. Gastón threatens Miguel. Celina has a bulimic scare. Carlo returns to Mexico. Mía confronts Miguel about his revenge; the most explosive scene of their relationship.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Six teenagers with different lives and personalities attend a prominent private school with only one thing in common: their vocation and passion for music.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Six teenagers with different lives and personalities attend a prominent private school with only one thing in common: their vocation and passion for music.

programme.title: Capítulo 207
programme.desc: Alma tries to make Franco see the truth about Valeria however, her evidence gets ruined. Gastón checks to see if José is registered for next year. Miguel confronts Mía about the money. Franco proposes to Valeria. Gastón continues to harass José. Some of the students things go missing. Celina progresses with the doctor. Miguel struggles with the truth of his father's death. Franco tells Mía he's marrying Valeria in a week. José leaves school. Gastón hits Miguel and Roberta defends him; Gastón chases her down.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Six teenagers with different lives and personalities attend a prominent private school with only one thing in common: their vocation and passion for music.

programme.title: Capítulo 209
programme.desc: Elena comes to Elite Way and tells Miguel the truth about his father's death. Peter tells Mía that the wedding is the next day and to be there for Franco. Mía asks Alma to go with her to the wedding. Elena and Miguel end the conversation with good memories; she tells him who called her to Mexico. Roberta invites Diego into her solitary room. Alma and Mía go to the wedding.

programme.title: Capítulo 210
programme.desc: At the last minute, Valeria refuses to marry Franco. Lupita wants to learn more about her father. Alma visits Franco; he tells her Marina, Mía's mother, is still alive. Mía admits she's saddened that Miguel may leave. Miguel tells the band he's staying at Elite Way. Franco thinks Alma may like him. RBD performs at the concert in the Palacio, real footage is used. León see the band perform. Miguel asks Franco for forgiveness; he forgives and they hug. Roberta tells Simon that it might be better if she left him. León confronts Diego at school about the concert.

programme.title: Capítulo 211
programme.desc: José defends Diego from León. Nico tells his parents he and Lupita are getting married. José, Téo, Nico, and Lupita listen to the message on León phone. Gastón tries to convince Mía to come back to him. Hilda tells Renata not to wait too long or she'll lose Madariaga. Mía identifies the voice of the message as Gastón's. Miguel comes up with a plan to get rid of Gastón and asks Mía to help. Renata kisses Madariaga. Diego hides from his father in Roberta's solitary room. The parents of the RBD members meet with Gandia about them possibly not being allowed in Elite Way next year. Mía asks Gastón to meet for the plan.

programme.desc: Six teenagers with different lives and personalities attend a prominent private school with only one thing in common: their vocation and passion for music.

programme.desc: Rosa recomienda a su hermano Albertano para presentar el nuevo shampoo Placentex Antiesponge. Maria le plancha el uniforme de Elvis y provoca los celos de Doña Lucha, que se lo arruga.

programme.title: El genio bursátil
programme.desc: Ludovico se mete en problemas en su trabajo cuando, por impertinente, trata de ayudar a Don Camerino en unos temas financieros. Tratando de solucionar el enredo, Ludovico complica todo aún más. Finalmente, y a punto de que ocurra un desastre financiero, Ludovico acude a la única persona que lo puede ayudar: Júnior.

programme.title: La navidad prefecta
programme.desc: Federica spends all the money Ludovico had saved up for Christmas.

programme.title: Subasta
programme.desc: Magdalena se da cuenta que puede sacarle dinero a los objetos viejos de Arturo y se da a la tarea de hacer una subasta, carísima por cierto.

programme.title: Frankie publicista
programme.desc: Vanesa desesperada por salir de sus deudas, busca la ayuda de Frankie para diseñar la publicidad de su negocio, pero al final se da cuenta que el de las ideas realmente era otro.

programme.title: Oriundas
programme.desc: Magdalena receives an unexpected visit, a visit that will expose her past in Angangueo. Alejandra and Rocko try at all costs to take advantage of Magda's friend, who has always been in love with Arturo.

programme.title: Huele a muerto
programme.desc: Los vecinos están preocupados porque en el edificio hay un olor a descompuesto que provoca que todos sean sospechosos. Frankie y familia temen que la desaparición de Rocko esté ligada a que los López Pérez están comiendo carne.

programme.title: El carro de Don Arturo
programme.desc: Luis se ha vuelto obsesivo con la limpieza y Silvia intentará hacer algo para que se le quite la obsesión. Además, los López Pérez se han ganado un carro de lujo y lo presumirán a todos los vecinos.

programme.title: La ley del Godín
programme.desc: Alejandra descubre que en su trabajo, su padre es el mandadero y todos sus compañeros lo tratan mal. ¿Crees que Alejandra lo defenderá o también lo tratará mal? Además, Germán se siente mal desde hace unos días y no sabe qué enfermedad tendrá.

programme.title: Foto tatarabuelo
programme.desc: Luis recibe la visita de su tía Enriqueta, quien le regala un cuadro de su tatarabuelo pintado por Diego y Frida. Al compartirlo con sus vecinos, solo recibe críticas. Germán tiene un ataque de celos porque Jorjais tiene un nuevo mejor amigo.

programme.title: La real sociedad
programme.desc: Andrés Vaca llega al edificio para pagar un favor y los vecinos aprovechan su visita para organizar un equipo de fútbol, mientras que las vecinas se organizan para ser la porra del equipo.

programme.title: Bodón loco
programme.desc: La trabajadora social descubre que Pedro y Cris no están casados, por lo que, para conservar a su hija, deberán organizar la boda en 24 horas. ¿Crees que con la ayuda de los vecinos podrán realizar un bodón loco?

programme.title: Desazolve
programme.desc: Neighbors face problems with water pressure and need to unblock the pipes, but opt to invest the money in lottery tickets. Morris, on the other hand, is influenced by reggaeton.

programme.title: Ruido fantasma
programme.desc: Los vecinos escuchan un ruido estremecedor en el edificio y sospechan que es un fantasma, por lo que deciden realizar un ritual para expulsarlo. Mientras tanto, Morris busca empleo.

programme.title: Nos cayó la chaviza
programme.desc: Uno de los departamentos está en renta y Sofi, una chava muy positiva, tiene interés en rentarlo. Pero, ¿crees que los vecinos accedan a tener una nueva inquilina? Por otro lado, Luis y Silvia tendrán diferencias por Sandro, la ex pareja de Silvia.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: In a neighborhood in Mexico City, the neighbors have problems and silly misadventures with one another.

programme.title: Día del niño
programme.desc: El Día del Niño llega y los vecinos se organizan para festejar en el edificio. Cada uno propone un acto para divertir a los pequeños y cada departamento aportará una cantidad de dinero. Sin embargo, Luis será el más afectado.

programme.title: Vecindad
programme.desc: Unos extranjeros que viven al lado del edificio buscan conocer la cultura mexicana, así que Doña Magda aprovecha para mostrarles que cada vecino tiene algo que enseñar a cambio de dinero. Checa hasta dónde llegará Doña Magda por obtener ganancias.

programme.title: Las tortas de mi primo
programme.desc: Un coach motivacional llega a la vida de Luis para intentar calmar su mal humor. Además, el primo de Germán llega de visita con tortas ahogadas de Guadalajara, y todos querrán la receta de su salsa, haciendo lo que sea por obtenerla.

programme.title: La casa de los riojosos
programme.desc: Un clásico entre América y Guadalajara desata una pelea entre Luis y Pedro. Averigua cómo terminará este conflicto. Además, los vecinos apoyarán a su favorito. Descubre si la relación entre ambos podrá recuperarse.

programme.title: La carnita y la mudanza
programme.desc: Por fin algo que jamás se pensaba ha sucedido, pues Lorena y Magda hacen alianzas para que Sofi, la nueva inquilina, se mude de la forma más tranquila posible. Además, el jefe de Arturo acude a su casa para comer con ellos.

programme.title: Cita de cata
programme.desc: Luis organiza una cata de vinos para impresionar a su jefe, pero los vecinos podrían arruinarlo. Liz ayuda a Vanesa a encontrar pareja por una aplicación.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: In a neighborhood in Mexico City, the neighbors have problems and silly misadventures with one another.

programme.title: Sortilegio
programme.desc: Alejandro returns home after a terrible accident to discover that he is married to Maria Jose, a poor, innocent girl who was deceived by Alejandro's brother Bruno. Bruno used Alejandro's name to marry Maria Jose, soon after he sent to kill his brother in hopes that Maria Jose would inherit Alejandro's fortune. But when Maria Jose arrives at the mansion she realizes that Bruno lied to her and used her. She is also scared when Alejandro is found alive and returns home. Doctors tell Alejandro that he suffers from memory loss but he is convinced he never met Maria Jose before and goes in search of the truth, but during this time and Maria Jose actually fall in love, while Bruno and Maura (Alejandro's ex-girlfriend) plot to break them up. Meanwhile, the brothers' mother Victoria has fallen in love with Fernando--Alejandro's best friend, so closer to his age than hers.

programme.desc: Alejandro returns home after a terrible accident to discover that he is married to Maria Jose, a poor, innocent girl who was deceived by Alejandro's brother Bruno. Bruno used Alejandro's name to marry Maria Jose, soon after he sent to kill his brother in hopes that Maria Jose would inherit Alejandro's fortune. But when Maria Jose arrives at the mansion she realizes that Bruno lied to her and used her. She is also scared when Alejandro is found alive and returns home. Doctors tell Alejandro that he suffers from memory loss but he is convinced he never met Maria Jose before and goes in search of the truth, but during this time and Maria Jose actually fall in love, while Bruno and Maura (Alejandro's ex-girlfriend) plot to break them up. Meanwhile, the brothers' mother Victoria has fallen in love with Fernando--Alejandro's best friend, so closer to his age than hers.

programme.title: Assembly Required with Stacey Abrams (How Billionaires Are Destroying the Media (with Joy Reid))
programme.desc: The media landscape in the US continues to undergo drastic transformations, with billionaire ownership and corporate consolidation leading to mass layoffs and content censorship. This week, Stacey is joined by Joy Reid, host of the Joy Reid Show and the first black woman to host a primetime program on cable news. They talk about the layoffs at the Washington Post, why she transitioned into independent media, what is lost when Black journalists are no longer at the table, and what people can do to inform themselves in an era where billionaires with agendas control the news.

programme.title: Pod Save America (Graham Platner Isn't Backing Down)
programme.desc: Graham Platner, a Democratic candidate running for Senate in Maine, stops by the studio to talk with Jon about Trump’s impending conflict with Iran, the future of Medicare for All, and what community organizing in rural Maine taught him about building political power in our polarized era. The two discuss new polls showing Platner leading Janet Mills in the Democratic Senate primary, how his tattoo controversy has resonated with Maine voters, and what he wants to change about the Democratic Party to rebuild a winning, working-class coalition.

programme.title: Lovett or Leave It (Lisa Rinna Opens Up About Her Traitors FEUD with Colton Underwood)
programme.desc: Lisa Rinna takes the Lovett or Leave It stage to take us behind the scenes of Traitors - and explain what happens when the inner Housewife is released.

programme.title: Strict Scrutiny (Why Is SCOTUS Hoarding Opinions?)
programme.desc: Leah, Melissa, Kate, and special guest Elie Mystal of The Nation speculate about why the Court is hoarding opinions this late into bad decision season before diving deep on the ruling in United States v. Hemani, which features drugs, the Second Amendment, and Amy Coney Barrett’s iconic Ambien jar. Also: games are played, a new summer cocktail makes its debut, and no holds are barred, especially when it comes to Trump’s flop makeover of the Reflecting Pool. This episode was recorded live at the Gramercy Theatre in New York City.

programme.title: Pod Save America (LIVE(ish) from the Obama Presidential Center)
programme.desc: Jon, Lovett, Tommy, and Dan record from Chicago after the dedication ceremony of the Obama Presidential Center, reacting to Barack and Michelle Obama's speeches, what it felt like to walk through the museum for the first time, and what lessons Democrats in the Trump era can take from Obama. Then, they react to the emerging details of Donald Trump's MOU with Iran, which he signed at the Palace of Versailles, JD Vance's efforts to seem like a normal person during his book tour, and why the algae in the Reflecting Pool is such an apt metaphor for Trump's presidency.

programme.title: Offline with Jon Favreau (Has The Left Finally Figured Out the Internet?)
programme.desc: Ever heard a popular TikToker wax poetic about who they’re voting for? They might be getting paid…and not disclosing by whom. Kyle Tharp, author of the Chaotic Era newsletter, joins Offline to discuss the emergence of pay-for-play political influencers and whether Democrats have made any progress in figuring out the internet. He and Jon talk about the decline of Ben Shapiro and the Daily Wire, the new success of legacy media on TikTok, and the intense grassroots anger around data centers.

programme.title: This F*cking Guy (Karoline Leavitt: Everything You Didn't Know About Her Sh*tty Past)
programme.desc: In our 38th episode of This F*cking Guy, Erin and Alyssa dive deep into the past of the MAGA mouthpiece, Karoline Leavitt. From “growing up in a small business family” to her college broadcasting days, to being the ultimate tradwife hypocrite, to shapeshifting into an obsequious Trump a** kisser, this may be one of our most irritating guys yet!

programme.title: The Spring Festival
programme.desc: Love is in the air as the first day of spring arrives in Hooterville. And who better to lead the town in celebrating it than Lisa. She is resolved to show Oliver just what spring is all about and sets out to produce a Spring festival celebration.

programme.title: Our Son, The Barber
programme.desc: It's a hair-raising episode as Eb (Tom Lester) enrolls in a correspondence course to become a barber. Lisa (Eva Gabor) and Oliver (Eddie Albert) give him the money to learn the trade but learning how to cut hair by mail has its glitches.

programme.title: Oliver's Jaded Past
programme.desc: For a lawyer, Oliver should be more careful about what he signs. Lisa reminds him that two years ago Oliver made her a promise to take her back to New York for a two-week vacation. And she has it in writing� on the bottom of the kitchen drawer.

programme.title: The Hungarian Curse
programme.desc: It's hard to know who has a curse over Oliver, but he sure has his hands full with Lisa and her fellow Hungarian Lazlo Broslav. Lazlo appears with a letter claiming he once saved the life of Lisa's uncle, and now her family must repay the debt.

programme.title: The Rutabaga Story
programme.desc: There's a problem in Hooterville: no farmer seems able to grow a cash crop on account of the quality of the soil. But as it turns out from Oliver's (Eddie Albert) soil and mineral research, the oft misunderstood rutabaga is an ideal choice.

programme.title: A Star Named Arnold Is Born (Part 1)
programme.desc: Green Acres goes Hollywood in this first installment of a two-part season finale. When Arnold the pig appears in a play at the Hooterville Theater, Lisa (Eva Gabor) arranges for an old friend to give Arnold a chance on the big screen.

programme.title: A Star Named Arnold Is Born (Part 2)
programme.desc: It's a swine-sational third season finale for Green Acres, as Oliver and Lisa chaperone Arnold, the Ziffel's talented pig, to Hollywood for his big screen test. There's only one problem, Lisa failed to mention that Arnold is not your normal actor.

programme.title: Guess Who's Not Going To The Luau
programme.desc: Hooterville is abuzz as the townsfolk enter a contest sponsored by Peterson's Poi Juice, with a trip to Hawaii as the top prize. But no one expects the winner to be Arnold, the Ziffels' talented pig. Maybe a pig might fly after all, to the islands!

programme.title: The Rummage Sale
programme.desc: A charity rummage sale asks for donated clothing. Being among the wealthier residents of Hooterville, the organizers look to the Douglases. It isn't long before Oliver has to stop Lisa from giving away his entire wardrobe!

programme.title: Eb's Romance
programme.desc: Love is in the air when Eb is quickly engaged to Loreli Appleby, whom he has only known for a day. Eb tries to impress Loreli's father, a farmer, but in typical fashion, he accidentally ruins his future father-in-law's cabbage crop.

programme.title: Hail To The Fire Chief
programme.desc: When Fire Chief Joe Carson is looking for a way to go to Miami, he hires Oliver as his assistant, hoping Oliver will pay for the trip. The plan backfires, no pun intended, when Oliver starts pointing out what a poor job the chief has been doing.

programme.title: The Candidate
programme.desc: The highways in Hooterville are in dire need of repair. Oliver is fed up and believes he can make a difference by complaining to his state representative, Ben Hanks. But Hanks' popularity proves greater than his sense of responsibility.

programme.title: Handy Lessons
programme.desc: Lisa feels like she should be contributing more and wants to start working in Oliver's construction business. Lisa is like a fish out of water as she arrives to the Monroes' workshop in overalls and causes one problem after another.

programme.title: A Husband For Eleanor
programme.desc: Lisa plays bovine matchmaker when Oliver and Lisa decide it is time for their female cow, Eleanor, to start providing milk for the farm. Oliver makes arrangements for Eleanor to mooooove in with the neighbor's bull, but Lisa has other ideas.

programme.title: Old Mail Day
programme.desc: The townsfolk look forward to "Old Mail Day", when once a year undelivered mail is handed out. The delayed mail includes a letter all the way from 1917! Oliver is upset by the poor service, but his complaints land with more impact than he intended.

programme.title: The Agricultural Student
programme.desc: When word spreads that an agricultural student is coming to Hooterville to study with county agent Hank Kimball, no one seems to be interested. However, things change when the folks discover that the student is an attractive blonde.

programme.title: How Hooterville Was Floundered
programme.desc: This episode tells the unusual tale of Hooterville's founding. As the town prepares for its centennial, Oliver announces a reenactment of the town's origins and casts himself and Lisa in the roles of Horace and Doris Hooter.

programme.title: Ophelia Visits Morticia
programme.desc: Ophelia taunts Uncle Fester into announcing that he is going to join the Peace Corps. Fester feels he's a cinch to be accepted because Gomez plans to pull strings in Washington on his behalf. The entire family agrees to help him study for the exam.

programme.title: Addams Cum Laude
programme.desc: Allyn Joslyn guest-stars as Sam Hilliard, a former truant officer who now heads a private school where Wednesday and Pugsley are enrolled. When Hilliard breaks under the strain of dealing with the Addams children, Gomez buys the school.

programme.title: Cat Addams
programme.desc: Dr. Marvin P. Gunderson is summoned to examine Kitty Kat, the ailing lion pet of the Addams Family. Morticia decides that it is the doctor who needs help. To build his confidence, human members of the family pretend to be ill so he can affect cures.

programme.title: Lurch's Little Helper
programme.desc: Morticia's concern that Lurch is overworked leads Gomez to the operating table to assemble a custom-built secondary butler. Lurch lets the robot do all the work and then begins to feel that he isn't needed anymore.

programme.title: The Addams Policy
programme.desc: When Uncle Fester incinerates the family's stuffed bear with his flamethrower, Morticia reports the accident to the insurance company. Mr. Henson, the head of the company, sends his assistant, Mr. Digby, to handle the case.

programme.title: Lurch's Grand Romance
programme.desc: Lurch suffers from unrequited love over Tiny Trivia (guest star Diane Jergens), Morticia's visiting school chum who only has eyes for show business. The entire family decides to try to turn their stolid butler in to a new personality.

programme.title: Ophelia's Career
programme.desc: When Ophelia laments that she has been jilted, Morticia suggests a career as an alternative to marriage. She tries chemistry first (with explosive results) then turns to operatic singing. Cousin Itt is summoned to coach her to stardom.

programme.title: The Addams Family Goes To School
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez decide to keep Wednesday and Pugsley home from school after Morticia sees the fairy tales they have to read. When the truant officer comes to investigate, he is shocked at what he finds.

programme.title: Morticia And The Psychiatrist
programme.desc: Morticia calls a psychiatrist after she fears Pugsley is becoming normal after he abandons his pet octopus for a puppy and is seen wearing a Boy Scout uniform, playing with a baseball bat, and helping an old lady cross the street.

programme.title: Fester's Punctured Romance
programme.desc: Uncle Fester, who has become lonely, convinces Gomez and Morticia that it is time for him to find a bride. He decides to put an ad in the newspaper, looking for love. But things go awry when a door-to-door saleswoman comes by.

programme.title: Gomez, The Politician
programme.desc: Election fever grips the Addams household, as Gomez (John Astin) supports the council candidate whose campaign promise is to drain the town's disgusting bogs. Morticia (Carolyn Jones), who likes "the lovely bogs," labels the candidate an extremist.

programme.title: The Addams Family Tree
programme.desc: Pugsley and Wednesday start a row at a party when their gift of a tarantula upsets Harold, the birthday boy. Harold's parents insist that the Addams children lack breeding and, therefore, are no longer allowed to play with their son.

programme.title: Morticia Joins The Ladies League
programme.desc: After Pugsley befriends Gorgo, a circus gorilla, Gorgo decides to follow Pugsley and Gomez home, where he is accepted as one of the family. But Gorgo gives Morticia's tea guests, the Ladies League members, quite a shock.

programme.title: Halloween With The Addams Family
programme.desc: A pair of bank robbers are welcomed as Halloween trick-or-treaters by Morticia and Gomez. The creepy atmosphere of the house, Morticia's smoldering holiday punch and Lurch's ominous presence impel the crooks to abandon their plans.

programme.title: Green Eyed Gomez
programme.desc: When Lionel Barker, a former suitor of Morticia, shows up, Gomez is jealous. But he's soon calmed when he learns that Barker is after Mildred, the new maid. The Addamses then discover that Barker is a con man--after Mildred's money, not her love.

programme.title: New Neighbors Meet The Addams Family

programme.desc: Kara and Scott deliver sharp takes on tech, business, politics—plus bold bets, banter, winners & losers.

programme.title: The Lost Art of Reinventing Yourself
programme.desc: Expect to learn what “Don’t half-ass it” means, the story of how Matthew got his iconic starting role in Dazed & Confused, how to see the upside during any crisis, why having a sense of humour should be your default emotion, McConaughey’s own version of his Lonely Chapter, when you should listen to your gut versus your head, why McConaughey turned down $14.5M to pursue something great, Matthew's reflections on the 10 year anniversary of Interstellar, lesson on finding the perfect partner, and much more…

programme.title: You Were Never Taught How to Be a Man
programme.desc: Hustle culture often tells us that working harder is the only way to succeed—grinding through 80-hour weeks on 4 hours of sleep per night. But what if the real solution isn’t about working harder, but finding balance? What if true success lies in slowing down, savouring life, smoking a cigar on the porch occasionally and being fully present. How differently might we define success then? Expect to learn who Dry Creek Dewayne’s is, his backstory and upbringing, how to un-harden yourself, how any person can overcome & control their anger, what Dewayne has learned from working with horses, the dangers of being out of balance in work & life, how to have a better relationship with the voice in your head, how to find the right partner & why men need to learn to treat women better, why bad fathers are partly to blame for the downfall of America’s culture, what a day in the life of Dewayne’s life is like and much more…

programme.title: We’re Living in a System Built by Lunatics
programme.desc: These days, making sense of the world is harder than ever. From billionaires reshaping governments to debates over whether modern car chassis can support the average obese person. There’s no shortage of absurdities. Luckily, Tom has plenty to say about them. Expect to learn why Gen Z is more likely to skip the gym and use Ozempic instead, if Tom can and will reset his Instagram algorithm, why Gen Z is more likely to drink less and smoke more, why the younger generation is sexless than most, Tom’s thoughts on Elon’s current rampage through government bureaucracy, Tom’s recent obsession with True Crime documentaries, why being competent is a curse and much more…

programme.title: 44 Harsh Truths About The Game Of Life
programme.desc: What does it mean to win at the game of life? Is it tons of wealth, pure happiness, infinite time, or a loving family? Today we explore the timeless question of what it means to truly live well. Expect to learn the true price of success, whether sacrificing your happiness is worth it, what advice Naval would give to his younger self, what the true source of unhappiness is for most people, how to overcome low self-esteem, what Naval would add to his ‘How To Get Rich’ thread, how to become comfortable being unapologetically selfish, what Naval sees as the next big trends in science and technology, his take on the escalating culture wars, how to get comfortable with death and overcoming grief, the best and worst ways to spend your wealth and much more…

programme.title: La noche más fría
programme.desc: The story focuses on Carlos, a former fighter from the Malvinas (Faulkland islands). Carlos lives in a large city square, under a gazebo that he found in the neighborhood. He tragically lost his family in the War. Times were not kind to Carlos. While looking to reunite with his son, he sweeps sidewalks in exchange for tips to help him survive winter nights which have a punishing effect on Carlo's health. Preparing for the coldest night of the year, driven by the impulse to make it, Carlos packs few belongings to seek refuge in a municipal locality. However, the luck again avoids him. An incident at the door of the shelter leaves Carlos unfairly outside. Completely unprotected, away from his usual spot, without shelter and weak health. The coldest night of the year is looming, and Carlos must face endless adversities in an uneven fight against two cruel enemies: loneliness and cold. Thus begins the coldest night only fueled by the desire to survive.
